MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES F. HANNAWALT, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3913 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Atty Fees is Granted, no opposition filed. Pursuant to the Court's order at the hearing on November 13, 2012, and filed on December 12, 2012, Plaintiff's counsel shall pay $4200 in reasonable attorney fees and costs to Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
